title: Crispy Duck Leg Crumble
description: A flavorful and crispy duck leg crumble dish, made with a mixture of crunchy elements and a hint of bitter flavors.
instructions: Season the duck legs with Chinese five-spice powder and a pinch of salt.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the duck legs and brown on both sides. Set aside.
In the same skillet, melt the bitter dark chocolate over low heat.
Transfer the duck legs to a baking dish and pour the melted chocolate over them.
Top with crumble topping, spreading it evenly.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the crumble is golden brown.
Remove from oven and brush with light soy sauce.
Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes to caramelize the sauce.
Garnish with thyme sprigs and serve.
